description: Native Windows direct-platform profile without WSL/Git Bash requirements
notes: Этот preset предназначен для нативного PowerShell запуска на Windows.
platform.xvfb и platform.ldPreload оставлены только для POSIX direct-platform contour-ов и не должны включаться здесь.
Template-managed xUnit contour на Windows по умолчанию остаётся fail-closed, пока проект не wired repo-owned capabilities.xunit.command.

xunit.unsupportedReason: Windows xUnit contour is project-specific; wire a repo-owned capabilities.xunit.command before treating this profile as green.

bdd.unsupportedReason: Windows BDD contour is project-specific; wire a real command before treating this profile as green.

smoke.unsupportedReason: Windows smoke contour is project-specific; wire a real command before treating this profile as green.

publishHttp.unsupportedReason: Windows publish contour is project-specific; wire a real command before treating this profile as green.
